a:r.a:t: Marauder-Like Fleet MRO | Marauder comp-set MRO totals $758M across six work segments, with 82% concentrated in depot ship repair and the rest in port and technical services
Note: Nuclear & Complex Overhauls column is blank because embedded MRO covers only CVN, SSN, SSBN, and surface-combatant programs
not MSC auxiliaries or USCG cutters. Source: FPDS FY2025 contract obligations. Data as of April 2026.
Primary MRO work types for Marauder-like vessels
$623M (82%). MSC ROH and mid-term availabilities at MSRA yards, booked under J998 / J999.
$28M (4%). Hull, mechanical, and electrical sustainment contracts outside the depot envelope.
MSC and USCG hulls do not carry the combat system load or nuclear overhaul stream that DDG and SSN fleets do.
$384M (51% of comp-set). Largest single hull program by far.
$43M combined (6%). Only USCG hulls with material FY2025 spend.
FY2025 Marauder-Like Fleet MRO by Hull × Work Segment ($M)
Anything different about doing MRO on an autonomous vessel vs the crewed ships in the comp-set?
